title: 1200 Pieces Rose Petals, Artificial Rose Flowers, No-Taste Emulation Silk Rose Petals for Bedroom, Wedding, Anniversary, Birthday Party, Valentine's Day, Confession Decoration (Pink)
features: 【YOU WILL RECEIVE】1200 pcs rose petals in a pack, Very high cost performance! The size of rose petals: about 5 x 5 cm .If you evenly spread 1200 petals, you will get a sea of flowers. Buy more for large-scale events, such as weddings, ceremonies, parties, decorations, etc.

【ROMANCE STARTS HERE】Artificial roses petalsmade of light silk cloth, and can be reused without fading. It is more economical and environmentally friendly than fresh petals. (Note: Since the rose petals is made of silk cloth, there may be a little smell when opening the bag, please don't worry, you just need to put them in a ventilated and dry place for 24 hours, and the smell will gradually go away.)

【EASY TO USE & PORTABLE 】When using, rub it with your fingers, and then the silk rose petals will spread out, which is convenient and saves time for sorting. The silk rose petals are compressed when they are packaged, and they are small in size and very convenient to carry.

【CREATE ATMOSPHERE】We rose petals very suitable for romantic nights, wedding, Valentine's Day, marriage proposals, baby showers, birthday party, etc. Suitable for sprinkling on wedding tables, wedding flower girl baskets, church aisles, self-service sweets, dessert tables, for taking pictures.

【PACKAGING】We use a multi-layer compression storage method to maintain the simulation texture before use, so you need to gently rub them with your hands to separate them to achieve a better viewing effect, and at the same time increase the fun of hands on. Create romance with your own hands!
